steps.title: What is the issue?
steps.body: Pointwise convergence lets the threshold depend on x. Uniform convergence asks for one threshold that works everywhere at once.

steps.title: Warm-up
steps.prompt: For f_n(x)=x^n and a fixed x<1, what happens as n grows?
explanations: Not for fixed x strictly less than 1.

steps.title: Try to make one N work
steps.prompt: Pick epsilon and N. The widget should help show why points near 1 keep causing trouble.
